name: Cyber Surfer Skateboard
description: Do you like cyberpunk? Do you like skateboarding? Then this game is for you! Welcome to the world where skateboarding belongs! In Cyber Surfer Skateboard, you can show off your skateboarding skills! Exciting music, fun obstacles, and sound effects will make you love this game! If you are a fan of skateboarding games, dont miss it! Have fun!
tags: 3D, Action, Arcade, Casual, Girl, Kid, running, Simulation, Skateboard
